CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt64, value Float64);
SELECT id, value, reinterpretAsInt128(value) AS reinterpreted_value FROM test_table;
CREATE TABLE subquery_table AS SELECT reinterpretAsInt128(value) AS reinterpret_value FROM test_table WHERE id > 1;
SELECT id, reinterpretAsInt128(value) AS reinterpreted_value, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM subquery_table) AS reinterpret_count FROM test_table;
SELECT id, reinterpretAsInt128(value * 2) AS reinterpreted_value FROM test_table WHERE reinterpretAsInt128(value) != 0;
SELECT id, reinterpretAsInt128(257) AS reinterpreted_int128_value, CAST(reinterpretAsInt128(257) AS String) AS string_value FROM test_table WHERE id = 1;
SELECT reinterpretAsInt128(CAST(random_value AS UInt64)) AS reinterpreted_from_string FROM another_table;
SELECT a.id, reinterpretAsInt128(b.value) AS reinterpreted_value FROM test_table a JOIN another_table b ON a.id = 1;
SELECT reinterpretAsInt128(value) AS reinterpreted_value FROM (SELECT value FROM test_table WHERE id <= 3) AS subquery;
SELECT reinterpretAsInt128(value) AS reinterpreted_value FROM (SELECT value FROM test_table ORDER BY id LIMIT 2) AS ordered_subquery;
SELECT reinterpretAsInt128(5.3) AS reinterpreted_float, reinterpretAsInt128(-123) AS reinterpreted_negative FROM test_table;
SELECT reinterpretAsInt128(toUInt64(1234567890)) AS reinterpreted_uint64_value, reinterpretAsInt128(toUInt8(255)) AS reinterpreted_uint8_value FROM test_table;
